goals: Calculate the final price of an item on sale to understand how much they'll save
Project how their savings could grow over time with compound interest to see the long-term benefit
Compare different discount percentages to decide which promotion offers the best value
Calculate selling price using markup to understand small business pricing

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but unfamiliar with financial calculations. Asks questions to understand concepts rather than just get numbers.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but no formal financial training. Does not know formulas, interest concepts, or tool names. Needs explanations and context to understand why calculations matter.

end_condition: The user has completed all four calculations and understands the results well enough to explain the concepts to another person.
